incidents.impact: close-only research datasets mislabel bar boundaries by one hour; leak-freedom of past pipeline evidence is unaffected (uniform shift), but session alignment (e.g. news windows) would be wrong
incidents.resolution: documented; dukascopy bid/ask datasets supersede histdata for research; histdata regeneration deferred to a follow-up
incidents.summary: committed HistData 1h CSVs carry a uniform +1h timestamp-label shift vs Dukascopy/FXCM UTC (measured: p50 mid diff 6.5 pips at lag 0 vs 1-2 pips at -1h, consistent across months)

incidents.impact: 2021-2022 unusable as a trusted comparison source
incidents.resolution: years excluded by measurement (build_candle_datasets.FXCM_YEARS); parser additionally fail-closes any file with >1% crossed rows
incidents.summary: FXCM archive 2021 weekly files carry 2.3-6.3% crossed-boundary rows (up to 10 pips inverted), 2022 up to 0.7%; 2023-2025 measured clean

incidents.impact: honest gaps recorded in the mirror manifest; retries completed the mirror with 0 failed urls
incidents.resolution: empty week = honest absence in the parser; backoff+retry in the fetcher
incidents.summary: FXCM serves empty gzip files for 2024 weeks 35/51/52 (all pairs); Dukascopy datafeed returned intermittent 503/timeouts during bulk mirror
